name: Beltarodi
metaTitle: Property in Beltarodi Nagpur | NMRDA Approved Plots | Mahalaxmi Infra
metaDescription: Buy NMRDA sanctioned, RERA approved plots in Beltarodi Nagpur. Starting ₹22 Lakh. Up to 90% bank finance. Contact Mahalaxmi Infra today.
heroSubheading: Wardha Road's Hidden Gem for Plot Buyers
introduction: Beltarodi is a rapidly developing residential locality situated along the Wardha Road corridor in Nagpur. Often referred to as an extension of Besa, Beltarodi has emerged as one of the most popular destinations for plot buyers looking for affordability without compromising on connectivity. The area sits in close proximity to MIHAN, making it a strategic investment destination for buyers who want to benefit from the MIHAN growth story at a lower price point than Sumthana or Jamtha. Multiple NMRDA-approved layouts have come up in Beltarodi over the past three years, and the area continues to see strong buyer interest. Plots in Beltarodi under 30 lakhs are still available, making this one of the most compelling value propositions on Wardha Road.
whyInvest: Close to MIHAN and Wardha Road corridor
Affordable alternative to Sumthana and Jamtha
Strong appreciation driven by MIHAN proximity
